summary: Align persisted credentials and setup instructions with ClickHouse Cloud Basic auth.
reason: The official ClickHouse Cloud OpenAPI spec uses Basic auth with an API key id and API key secret. The generated one-token auth command left persisted credentials unable to produce an Authorization header because AuthHeader requires both username and password fields.
validated_outcome: go test, go vet, go build, and cli-printing-press dogfood all pass with Basic-auth credential persistence using key id plus key secret. The legacy single-token SaveCredential helper now fails fast and directs callers to SaveBasicCredentials.
